Bash("C:/Users/tyrel/Documents/monster-quest/Rpg-Prototype/web/.venv/Scripts/python" -c "
from PIL import Image
img = Image.open\('C:/Users/tyrel/Documents/monster-quest/Rpg-Prototype/assets/sprites/creatures/alexia_battle.png'\)
print\('Mode:', img.mode\)
if img.mode == 'RGBA':
    r,g,b,a = img.split\(\)
    import numpy as np
    alpha = np.array\(a\)
    transparent = \(alpha == 0\).sum\(\)
    total = alpha.size
    print\(f'Transparent pixels: {transparent}/{total} \({100*transparent//total}%\)'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash("C:/Users/tyrel/Documents/monster-quest/Rpg-Prototype/web/.venv/Scripts/python" -c "
from rembg import remove
from PIL import Image
import io

with open\('C:/Users/tyrel/Downloads/elf bandit female no quiver.png', 'rb'\) as f:
    content = f.read\(\)
print\('Input size:', len\(content\)\)
result = remove\(content\)
print\('Output size:', len\(result\)\)
img = Image.open\(io.BytesIO\(result\)\)
print\('Mode:', img.mode\)
" 2>&1)
